name: Date and Pecan Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Mix in vanilla extract.
3. Stir in flour, then add pecans and dates. Mix thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
4. Shape the dough into walnut-sized balls.
5. Line a baking sheet with waxed paper.
6. Place the balls on the prepared sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
7. Freeze for 15 minutes or refrigerate overnight.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Lightly grease baking sheets.
10. Arrange the dough balls on the sheets, keeping at least 1 inch between each.
11. Bake until golden brown, about 15-20 minutes.
12. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
13. Roll each ball in powdered sugar to coat.
14. Return to the sheet and roll again in powdered sugar.
15. Store in an airtight container.
Note: Do not use aggressive language like "kill the heat," "smash," or other harsh terms. Use gentle instructions like "turn off" for power settings and avoid words like "destroy," "burn," "splutter," or "execute."
